title: Scale a Service
story: Traffic is spiking. Scale the `web` service to 3 replicas using Docker Compose.
objectives: Confirm 3 containers for the `web` service are running
hints: `docker compose up --scale web=3 -d` scales a service
Or add `deploy.replicas: 3` in the Compose file (requires Swarm or Compose v3 with deploy)
